data.name: Hentai Age Running
data.detailed_description:
Step into a relaxing and enchanting puzzle adventure where every completed level reveals a stunning portrait of a beautiful girl. Enjoy a calm, atmospheric experience as you slide, swap, and arrange tiles to uncover each image piece by piece. With difficulty scaling smoothly across stages, your focus and puzzle-solving skills will be gently put to the test.

Play entirely at your own pace—no timers, no pressure, just pure stress-free gameplay. Whether you're a casual player or a puzzle enthusiast, this title offers captivating visuals and a soothing flow you can return to anytime.

Features :

Unlock charming artwork: Reveal new illustrations of lovely girls as you progress.

Relaxing soundtrack: Soft background music creates a peaceful, immersive atmosphere.

Full-image viewer: Enjoy each completed picture in full once the puzzle is finished.

Endless progression: Experience countless levels with gradually increasing challenge.

No time limits: Play freely without rush or stress.

data.short_description: A calming tile-sliding puzzle game where each completed stage reveals a beautiful illustration. Play at your own pace with no time limits, enjoy relaxing music, and unlock a gallery of charming artwork as difficulty gradually increases.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
